expectedClassifications.testName: Expect columns to be visible when filled with data - Workstreams tab
expectedClassifications.notes: Source uses inline assertions, target uses POM delegation (expectColumnsVisible). Target has additional activity-timeline route intercept. Helper resolution should bring weights close enough for PARITY.

expectedClassifications.testName: Expect table to be empty if a team is not selected - Workstreams tab
expectedClassifications.notes: Source uses inline assertions + waitFor, target uses POM delegation. Both verify empty state then filled state. Structural equivalence despite mechanism change.
